steps.title: Separate the main clauses
steps.content: The first main clause says the exhibition set out to provide an overview of photography by women from the 1920s through the 1950s. The second main clause says its efforts were largely successful, with an introductory phrase before it.

steps.title: Join the clauses correctly
steps.content: B uses and without the expected comma between two long main clauses. C fuses the clauses without punctuation, and D creates a comma splice. A comma plus the coordinating conjunction and correctly links the two clauses. The answer is A.
